title: clerodendrum mandrarense
intro: Clerodendrum mandrarense, also known as the 'Clerodendrum', is a flowering plant native to the island of Madagascar, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of Clerodendrum mandrarense include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions made from its leaves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
